title: October 14
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 14''' is the 287th day of the year (288th in leap years). 78 days remain in the year.</noinclude>
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[David Kaye]] is born.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' published.
*1998 – [[Star Wars Manga: A New Hope 3|''Star Wars Manga: A New Hope'' 3]] published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Agenda]]'' webcomic released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2009]] – [[Star Wars: Invasion 0|''Star Wars: Invasion'' 0]] published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Nomad Droids]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Galactic Strongholds]]'' released.
*2014 – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion]]'' released on DVD.
*2014 – ''[[Star Wars Art: Posters]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Chewbacca (2015) 1|''Chewbacca'' (2015) 1]] published.
*2015 – [[Shattered Empire 3|''Shattered Empire'' 3]] published.
*2015 – "[[The Lost Commanders]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2018]] – "[[The Triple Dark]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 6|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 6]] published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars Galaxy of Creatures]]'' premieres on the [[StarWarsKids.com]] YouTube channel with the episodes [[Porgs (episode)|"Porgs"]] and [[Bantha (episode)|"Bantha"]].
*[[2022]] – [[Jan Rabson]] dies.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic – Fear of the Jedi (trade paperback)]]'' published.
*2025 – [[Star Wars Insider 234|''Star Wars Insider'' 234]] published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars Insider: The High Republic: Tales of Enlightenment]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)]]'' reprinted in a deluxe hardcover.
